title: Render the Next Era of Creation with BytePlus AI Stack
description:
The AI stack you ship on is about to change. **BytePlus** — ByteDance's enterprise AI arm — is opening the hood on the tools their own teams use to build at scale, live in Ho Chi Minh City as part of Agentic AI Build Week.

This is hands-on and builder-first. Come build, not just watch.

 **What you'll take away**

- A working view of the BytePlus AI stack — from idea to shipped AI product, faster

- Practical patterns you can put to work the same week during the hackathon

- For qualifying startups: a path into the **V-START Global Accelerator** (up to **$15,000** in AI & cloud credits)

 **Your speakers**

- **Vu Tien Hung** — Senior Manager, Enterprise Sector, BytePlus

- **Lam Thao** — Solution Architect, BytePlus

- **Tran Quoc Huy** — Enterprise Sales Manager, BytePlus

 **Event details**

- 📅 Tuesday, July 8, 2026

- 🕐 10:00 AM – 12:00 PM (Indochina Time, GMT+7)

- 📍 TBC, HCMC

- 🎟 Part of Agentic AI Build Week (July 8–12, 2026)

- ✅ Private event · approval required · limited seats

 **Before you apply:** You must be registered for Agentic AI Build Week — [👉 Register for Agentic AI Build Week](https://luma.com/gaf-hm61) if you haven't yet. Seats are prioritised for Builder & Founding Builder ticket holders, so don't forget to [🚀 Sign up for the AABW Buildathon on Devpost](https://agentic-ai-build-week-2026.devpost.com/?utm_source=luma).

 **👉 Apply now to request your seat. Approval required, and seats are filling fast.**
takeaways: A working view of the BytePlus AI stack — from idea to shipped AI product, faster
Practical patterns you can put to work the same week during the hackathon
For qualifying startups: a path into the V-START Global Accelerator (up to $15,000 in AI & cloud credits)

Tran Quoc Huy — Enterprise Sales Manager, BytePlus

title: Inside NVIDIA Inception Program: How Startups Build & Scale AI Globally
description:
Every serious AI startup eventually hits the same wall: compute, capital, and connections. **NVIDIA Inception** exists to knock it down — and in 45 focused minutes, you'll learn exactly how.

 **What you'll take away**

- The real map from prototype to production with NVIDIA

- Technical resources, startup-friendly offers, investor access, and go-to-market support members tap into

- A **free NVIDIA DLI course** for every participant

 **Your speaker**

- **Jason Pham** — NVIDIA Inception Community Manager, Southeast Asia — the person who connects the region's AI startups to the NVIDIA ecosystem

 **Event details**

- 📅 Tuesday, July 8, 2026

- 🕐 2:00 PM – 2:45 PM (Indochina Time, GMT+7)

- 📍 Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam — exact venue confirmed closer to the date

- 🎟 Part of Agentic AI Build Week (July 8–12, 2026)

- ✅ Private event · approval required · limited seats

 **Before you apply:** You must be registered for Agentic AI Build Week — **[👉 Register for Agentic AI Build Week](https://luma.com/gaf-hm61)** if you haven't yet. Seats are prioritised for Builder & Founding Builder ticket holders, so don't forget to **[🚀 Sign up for the AABW Buildathon on Devpost](https://agentic-ai-build-week-2026.devpost.com/?utm_source=luma)** **.**

 **👉 Apply now to request your seat. Approval required, and seats are filling fast.**
takeaways: The real map from prototype to production with NVIDIA
Technical resources, startup-friendly offers, investor access, and go-to-market support members tap into
A free NVIDIA DLI course for every participant

title: TRAE in Your Professional Workflow
description:
The builders pulling ahead right now aren't working harder. They've rewired how they work. **TRAE** shows you how.

 **What you'll take away**

- A practical look at folding agentic AI into the way you actually build, day to day

- Workflow moves you can use the same night during the hackathon

- A sharper edge in an AI era that rewards builders who adapt fast

 **Your speaker**

- **Rita Huang** — Product Operations Manager, TRAE

 **Event details**

- 📅 Tuesday, July 8, 2026

- 🕐 3:00 PM – 4:00 PM (Indochina Time, GMT+7)

- 📍 TBC, HCMC

title: Build, Deploy & Monetize AI Agents: The Future of the Developer Economy
description:
Building an AI agent is one thing. Getting it deployed, used, and **paying you** is another. This session is about the second part.

 **What you'll take away**

- Repeatable patterns for turning agents into a real developer economy — build, deploy, monetize

- Practical, ship-it-this-week tactics (not theory)

- **$25 in Apify platform credits** for every registered builder, with top-ups at the Apify booth

 **Your speakers**

- **Saurav Jain** — Senior Developer Community Manager, Apify

- **Jakub Drobnik** — Engineering Team Lead, Apify

 **Event details**

- 📅 Thursday, July 10, 2026

- 🕐 10:00 AM – 12:00 PM (Indochina Time, GMT+7)

- 📍 VNG Group JSC, Ho Chi Minh

- 🎟 Part of Agentic AI Build Week (July 8–12, 2026)

- ✅ Private event · approval required · limited seats

 **Before you apply:** You must be registered for Agentic AI Build Week — [👉 Register for Agentic AI Build Week](https://luma.com/gaf-hm61) if you haven't yet. Seats are prioritised for Builder & Founding Builder ticket holders, so don't forget to [🚀 Sign up for the AABW Buildathon on Devpost](https://agentic-ai-build-week-2026.devpost.com/?utm_source=luma).

 **👉 Apply now to request your seat. Approval required, and seats are filling fast.**

$25 in Apify platform credits for every registered builder, with top-ups at the Apify booth

title: Beyond Autocomplete: How Agentic AI Solves the Enterprise Design Bottleneck
description:
Most AI tools generate plausible pixels, not usable systems. **Linh Nguyen** shows you the difference — and why it matters for anyone building real products.

 **What you'll take away**

- A demo-driven walkthrough of agentic AI that plans, executes, and self-corrects toward a result you can actually ship

- How Obello treats brand guidelines as executable constraints — using their real work as the example

- A new way to think about what AI systems should do for you

 **Your speaker**

- **Linh Nguyen** — Google Developer Expert (AI/ML) & Head of AI at Obello. The first woman in Vietnam named to Google's Developer Expert program for AI, with 14 years in NLP & machine learning and a Master's from the National University of Singapore.

 **Event details**

- 📅 Thursday, July 10, 2026

- 🕐 2:00 PM – 3:00 PM (Indochina Time, GMT+7)

- 📍 VNG Group JSC, Ho Chi Minh

- 🎟 Part of Agentic AI Build Week (July 8–12, 2026)

- ✅ Private event · approval required · limited seats

 **Before you apply:** You must be registered for Agentic AI Build Week — **[👉 Register for Agentic AI Build Week](https://luma.com/gaf-hm61)** if you haven't yet. Seats are prioritised for Builder & Founding Builder ticket holders, so don't forget to [🚀](https://agentic-ai-build-week-2026.devpost.com/?utm_source=luma) **[Sign up for the AABW Buildathon on Devpost](https://agentic-ai-build-week-2026.devpost.com/?utm_source=luma)** **.**

 **👉 Apply now to request your seat. Approval required, and seats are filling fast.**

How Obello treats brand guidelines as executable constraints — using their real work as the example
A new way to think about what AI systems should do for you

title: Networking Night
description:
## NOT EVERY GREAT CONVERSATION FITS INTO A THEME.

Across Agentic AI Build Week, we ran private networking events for visual AI, gaming, and robotics. This is the one where everything — and everyone — comes together.

The AABW Builder Networking Night is an invitation-only closing event, curated for the most engaged builders, investors, and industry leaders from the entire week.

* * *

## 👋 WHAT THIS IS

A private, by-application evening gathering for a select group of practitioners from across the AI ecosystem. No agenda. No panels. No pitches.

Just the kind of genuine, unhurried conversation that happens when the right people are finally in the same room — with nowhere else to be.

* * *

## 🌐 WHO'S IN THE ROOM

- Founders and builders from across the AI stack

- Investors and VCs active in the Southeast Asia and global AI ecosystem

- Corporate and brand leaders at the frontier of AI adoption

- Industry players who shaped what this week became

* * *

## 💡 HOW IT WORKS

Attendance is by application and personal review. We curate every room we run — and this one is no different. Every person here was selected because they make the room better for everyone else in it.

Part of Agentic AI Build Week — Ho Chi Minh City, 8–12 July 2026.

📅 11 July 2026

⏰ 6:00 PM – 8:00 PM

📍 Ho Chi Minh City

Close the week right. Apply to attend 👉 [**HERE**](https://luma.com/fojg38pi)

* * *

## ONE REQUIREMENT

To be eligible for this networking event, you must be registered for Agentic AI Build Week. Register for the main event 👉 [**HERE**](https://luma.com/t6n0irct?utm_source=luma_networkingevent)
requirements: Must be registered for Agentic AI Build Week
Private event; approval required; limited seats
